## Summary
<!-- What changed and why? (1–3 bullet points) -->
-
-

## Type of change
- [ ] New blog post(s)
- [ ] Publish drafts (sitemap + blog index update)
- [ ] Bug fix / content correction
- [ ] Site feature or layout change
- [ ] SEO / meta update

## Checklist
- [ ] All new blog posts have correct dates in `<meta>` and JSON-LD schema
- [ ] YouTube embed placeholders are in place (if video not yet available)
- [ ] New posts added to `sitemap.xml` with correct `<lastmod>`
- [ ] New posts added to `blog/index.html` with card + SVG thumbnail
- [ ] Canonical URLs are correct
- [ ] No broken internal links

## Notes for reviewer
<!-- Anything a reviewer should know — e.g. "video will be added later", "waiting for Partner Center approval" -->
